title: HackerRank open sourced its ATS. My resume scored 90/100. Oh wait 74. No – 88
summary: The article discusses HackerRank open-sourcing its Applicant Tracking System (ATS) and the author's experience testing their resume against it, noting inconsistent scores (90, 74, 88). It explores how AI/ML-driven ATS systems parse and rank resumes, highlighting variability and potential biases in automated screening.
